message:
fix(daemon): add signal handling and log rotation detection to tailFollow (bd-24)

tailFollow had an infinite loop with no exit condition. On EOF it spun in a
100ms sleep loop on the old fd, missing log rotation by lumberjack. Now:
- Handles SIGINT/SIGTERM for graceful exit
- Detects file rotation via os.SameFile (cross-platform inode comparison)
- Detects file truncation and resets read position
- Uses non-blocking signal check in the poll loop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/marble
